'''hakono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iatrotechnics|iatrotechnics]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-k-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iatrotechnics|iatrotechnics]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hakono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hækeneth|hækeneth]] || [[word:hækenej|hækenej]] || [[word:hækenesh|hækenesh]] || [[word:hækene|hækene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hakokonoth|hakokonoth]] || [[word:hakokonoj|hakokonoj]] || [[word:hakokonosh|hakokonosh]] || [[word:hakokono|hakokono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hakonoth|hakonoth]] || [[word:hakonoj|hakonoj]] || [[word:hakonosh|hakonosh]] || [[word:hakono|hakono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hakofnofth|hakofnofth]] || [[word:hakofnofj|hakofnofj]] || [[word:hakofnofsh|hakofnofsh]] || [[word:hakofnof|hakofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hakonotho|hakonotho]] || [[word:hakonojo|hakonojo]] || [[word:hakonosho|hakonosho]] || [[word:hakonoko|hakonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hakonoth|hakonoth]] || [[word:hakonoj|hakonoj]] || [[word:hakonosh|hakonosh]] || [[word:hakono|hakono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hakonothol|hakonothol]] || [[word:hakonojol|hakonojol]] || [[word:hakonoshol|hakonoshol]] || [[word:hakonokol|hakonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hakonoothotho|hakonoothotho]] || [[word:hakonoojojo|hakonoojojo]] || [[word:hakonooshosho|hakonooshosho]] || [[word:hakonooko|hakonooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hakonothon|hakonothon]] || [[word:hakonojon|hakonojon]] || [[word:hakonoshon|hakonoshon]] || [[word:hakonokon|hakonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hakonothooro|hakonothooro]] || [[word:hakonojooro|hakonojooro]] || [[word:hakonoshooro|hakonoshooro]] || [[word:hakonokooro|hakonokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
